name: backwise-kit
title: Backwise Kit
description: Quickly find and copy colors from your design system.
author: maxime

commands.name: search-colors
commands.title: Search Colors
commands.subtitle: backwise kit
commands.description: Search design system colors and copy them to the clipboard.

commands.name: legal-info
commands.title: Legal Info
commands.subtitle: backwise kit
commands.description: Company legal identifiers (SIREN, SIRET, VAT, NAF) with a link to the public registry.

preferences.name: iban
preferences.title: IBAN
preferences.description: Company IBAN. Stored locally in Raycast preferences — never committed to the repository.

preferences.name: bic
preferences.title: BIC
preferences.description: Company BIC / SWIFT code. Stored locally in Raycast preferences — never committed to the repository.
